title: Totals and progress figures visible on collapsed groups
excerpt: Where you have totals per groups underneath columns such as status, time tracking and progress bars, I think it would be useful to have these totals visible on the group line when the group is collapsed, so that you don’…

posts.author: amybrand (Amy Brand)
posts.cookedHtml: Where you have totals per groups underneath columns such as status, time tracking and progress bars, I think it would be useful to have these totals visible on the group line when the group is collapsed, so that you don’t have to expand the group in order to see, for example, total time taken on all tasks in the group, or the split between different statuses.

posts.author: RuthyLicht (Ruthy)
posts.cookedHtml:
YESSS!!!
I was just about to open a new ticket for it!
This would be really amazing - it creates an easy “mini-dashboard” for the prgoress / division of each group and would be so helpful!

monday collapsed|690x54

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
Great idea! I think to the hidden information (when a group is collapsed) from the footer can be of great value.

I’ve made a similar request a while ago; Footer of columns

Hope this enhancement can be implemented.

All the best.

posts.author: rider99 (R Burl)
posts.cookedHtml:
Did anything ever come of this? I was just about to submit a similar request. There’s little value in knowing how many tasks you have when a group is collapsed. There’s a ton of value in knowing the status of that group.

This would be incredibly helpful for dashboards as well.
